Auth.signInDesc: Enter your email and password to access your notes.
Auth.signUpDesc: Sign up to start organizing your thoughts.
Auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Auth.errorEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.
Auth.successVerification: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
Auth.validationEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
Auth.validationPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

NoteForm.editDesc: Modify the details of your note.
NoteForm.validationTitleMaxLength: Title must be 120 characters or less.
NoteForm.validationDescriptionMaxLength: Description must be 5000 characters or less.

DeleteDialog.title: Delete Note
